vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely non-representative of the current visual data. P1 (String of Nickels) is absent/bare soil. P2 (Mexican Mint) is absent/bare soil. P3 (Pothos) is present but in a state of severe decline. P4 (Silver Guest) is absent.

plant_audit.P1: Empty yellow pot; no vegetative matter detected.
plant_audit.P2: Empty black pot; no vegetative matter detected.
plant_audit.P3: Pothos specimen shows extreme chlorosis and turgor loss. The leaf is thin, pale, and drooping significantly.
plant_audit.P4: No evidence of the Silver Guest specimen.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Soil appears dark and potentially waterlogged or compacted. Surface debris (eggshell fragments) is present in the P3 pot.
biome_observations.desk_surface: Clean, no significant fungal or pest activity observed on the desk surface itself.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t5: Initial state showed a single Pothos leaf and a rabbit anchor.
temporal_deltas.t5_to_current: Progressive decline of the Pothos leaf. The leaf has lost structural integrity and is now nearly horizontal, indicating a failure in vascular support or root-zone health.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of critical collapse. The Pothos (P3) is the only remaining specimen, and it is exhibiting signs of terminal senescence or severe environmental stress (likely root rot or light starvation).
anomalies: Presence of eggshell fragments as a soil amendment/top-dressing (New Intervention).
Total loss of P1, P2, and P4 specimens.
vision_report.narrative_description: The botanical environment has undergone a catastrophic decline over the 5-day observation period. Starting with a sparse but extant collection, the biome has transitioned to a near-total loss. The Pothos in P3 is the sole survivor, currently displaying advanced signs of physiological distress, characterized by extreme leaf thinning and loss of turgor. The soil in all pots appears to be devoid of healthy, active plant life, suggesting a failure in the maintenance protocol or an acute environmental shock.
